feedback.text: Hello, i am here to voice my feedback on this topic as this is very important to me and many of my friends and in my online community. my feedback is quite simple, i am a supporter of the on going "Stop Killing Games" initiative and would like for who ever is looking at this to look into that movement, as it has gotten as of now 1.4 million signatures on its petition, and i think that movement fits perfectly in. But dont take my word for it, you can check it out for yourselves, Ross Scott from the youtube channel named Accursed Farms explains this is great detail and has a better way with words than i do as a simple ordinary gamer. thank you for your time, and i hope for positive feedback.
